layout_and_spacing.container: bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm overflow-hidden flex flex-col h-full

gantt_container.description: Uses CSS Grid or Flex with a sticky left pane. The right side scrolls horizontally.
gantt_container.classes: flex w-full overflow-x-auto relative scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-slate-300

left_panel.description: Sticky column on the left containing request details. 2-line high-density layout.
left_panel.classes: sticky left-0 z-20 bg-white border-r border-slate-200 shadow-[4px_0_12px_rgba(0,0,0,0.03)] flex flex-col
left_panel.header_cell: h-14 flex items-center px-4 border-b border-slate-200 bg-slate-50/80 backdrop-blur text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-slate-500
left_panel.row_cell: h-16 px-4 border-b border-slate-100 flex items-center gap-3 hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors group cursor-pointer

timeline_grid.header_area: sticky top-0 z-10 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-slate-200 flex flex-col
timeline_grid.month_cell: px-2 text-xs font-medium text-slate-600 sticky left-80
timeline_grid.day_cell: w-10 shrink-0 flex flex-col items-center justify-center border-r border-slate-100 text-[10px]
timeline_grid.grid_row: flex h-16 border-b border-slate-100 relative group hover:bg-slate-50/30 transition-colors

today_marker.description: A sharp, clear vertical line crossing the entire chart.
today_marker.classes: absolute top-0 bottom-0 w-px bg-emerald-500 z-10 pointer-events-none
today_marker.node: absolute -top-1 -translate-x-1/2 w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-emerald-500 shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(16,185,129,0.8)]

timeline_bar.description: The actual task span. Uses subtle borders and solid backgrounds to feel tactile, not flat.
timeline_bar.inner_bar: w-full h-full rounded-md border flex items-center px-2.5 shadow-sm transition-transform hover:-translate-y-[1px] hover:shadow-md cursor-pointer

no_due_date.solution: Do not render a bar. Render a 'TBD Milestone Pill' at the created_date.
no_due_date.classes: absolute top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 h-6 w-16 bg-slate-50 border border-dashed border-slate-400 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm
no_due_date.trailing_line: absolute top-1/2 left-full w-8 h-px bg-gradient-to-r from-slate-400 border-dashed to-transparent

far_future_infinite_date.solution: Cap the rendering at a maximum date range (e.g., end of currently loaded quarter). If a bar exceeds this, cut it off and apply a fade mask.
far_future_infinite_date.fade_effect: after:absolute after:top-0 after:-right-4 after:w-8 after:h-full after:bg-gradient-to-r after:from-[color] after:to-transparent after:opacity-50

legend.classes: flex items-center gap-4 px-4 py-3 border-t border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 text-xs text-slate-600

interactions.hover_row: Highlight both the left panel cell and the timeline grid row simultaneously. Requires shared state or group-hover if structured correctly.
interactions.click_row: Opens a Shadcn Sheet (Side Panel) containing the full request details.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the Gantt using standard flex/grid layouts. Keep the left panel sticky with `sticky left-0 z-20`.
For the timeline bars, use absolute positioning `left: [calc]%` and `width: [calc]%` relative to the grid row.

To solve the infinite timeline bug: Instead of rendering `due_date || infinity`, compute `actual_due_date = due_date || null`. If null, render the `<NoDueDatePill />` component at `created_date`. If `due_date` exceeds the `max_visible_date` of your chart window, cap the `width` percentage to 100% and apply `rounded-r-none` with an arrow icon.
Ensure Overdue items (due_date < today && status !== final_approved) use the striped background utility provided in `component_specifics.timeline_bar.overdue_styling`.
Add `data-testid` to all clickable rows and bars for testing.
